title: Serverside CarryOn
description: It is the main feature of the Carry On mod, but server-side only: you can carry mobs and place them down
body:
## Serverside CarryOn

**Serverside CarryOn** brings the main Carry On gameplay feature to servers: you can pick up mobs and place them down, without needing the full original mod setup on every player.

This mod is focused on simple, practical mob handling for survival and multiplayer servers.

## Features

- Carry and place mobs with simple controls
- Server-focused behavior
- OP controls to enable or disable the system
- Lightweight and easy to use

## How to use

- **Pick up a mob:** sneak + right-click a mob
- **Place it down:** sneak + right-click a block
- You must have an **empty main hand** for carry actions

## Commands (OP only)

- `/servercarry on` - enable carrying
- `/servercarry off` - disable carrying
- `/servercarry status` - check current status

## Notes

- Built for modern Fabric server setups
- Intended to be straightforward and user-friendly
- Great for transport, base organization, and general mob management
